programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: In this nail-biting action film, when an aging hitman (Charles Bronson) takes on an eager apprentice (Jan-Michael Vincent) they become an unmatchable team of killers...until the pupil's ruthlessness puts the two on a deadly collision course!

programme.title: Mr. Majestyk
programme.desc: Cinema tough guy Charles Bronson stars as Majestyk, an ex-con and Vietnam vet, whose efforts to run a farm are thwarted by narrow-minded locals and corrupt cops. But when a Mafia hitman destroys his crop, the farmer's fuse is finally blown.

programme.title: Murphy's Law
programme.desc: Charles Bronson stars as an LAPD cop framed for murder by Joan Freeman, a vicious ex-con he had put in prison. Going on the run and handcuffed to a foul-mouthed petty thief, he attempts to track down Freeman even as she keeps killing his associates.

programme.title: Kinjite: Forbidden Subjects
programme.desc: Action superstar Charles Bronson is at his two-fisted best in this gritty thriller about a hardnosed vice cop who is hellbent on wiping out a child prostitution ring after an assault on his young daughter; taking vengeance into his own hands!

programme.title: Death Wish II
programme.desc: Paul Kersey (Charles Bronson) is no victim: He fights back – with a vengeance! After beginning a new life in L.A., Kersey's daughter is viciously assaulted. Now, he won't rest until he tracks the assailants down...and puts them all in the ground!

programme.title: Death Wish 3
programme.desc: A battle-weary Paul Kersey (Charles Bronson) longs to leave his fighting days behind him. But when he arrives in New York to visit a friend and finds him brutally attacked, the silent avenger must wage war again in this no-holds-barred thriller!

programme.title: Death Wish 4: The Crackdown
programme.desc: Paul Kersey (Charles Bronson) is on a mission to take down the L.A. drug trade after his girlfriend's teenage daughter tragically dies of an overdose. He's armed and dangerous...and mad as hell in this take-no-prisoners, pulse-pounding thriller.

programme.title: Death Wish V: The Face Of Death
programme.desc: Former vigilante Paul Kersey (Charles Bronson) has moved back to New York and is leading a quiet life. But when his beautiful fiancee (Lesley-Anne Down) is killed, once again upholding the law becomes his way of life...and this time it's for good!

programme.title: Missing In Action
programme.desc: American servicemen are still being held captive in Vietnam – and it's up to one man to bring them home in this blistering, fast-paced action/adventure starring martial arts superstar Chuck Norris.

programme.title: Missing In Action 2: The Beginning
programme.desc: Chuck Norris returns as James Braddock in this action-packed prequel to the original hit film. As war rages in Vietnam, Braddock and his men are captured and imprisoned. With fists and sheer courage, he must become an army of one to save his men.

programme.title: Braddock: Missing In Action III
programme.desc: When Colonel James Braddock (Chuck Norris, "Missing in Action") is told that his wife and 12-year-old son are still alive in Communist Vietnam, he mounts a one-man assault to free them…armed with the latest high-tech firepower, of course!

programme.title: The Battle Of Britain (1969)
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: With an all-star cast that includes Sean Connery, Anthony Hopkins, Laurence Olivier, Gene Hackman and Robert Redford, this epic WW II drama recreates Operation Market Garden, an ambitious plan to hasten the end of WW II that ended in disaster.
